storyInfo: Hoshiguma escapes and encounters Detective Koretou in an alley on Nita Street. Rather than leave Higashi as Koretou advises her, she resolves to fight Mifune and face the sins of the past head-on. Just then, Hoshiguma hears Momoka's call.

attributes.content: Don't just stand there! These scoundrels aren't half as well-behaved as the suspect!
attributes.name: Frustrated Police

attributes.content: ...I'm tired.
attributes.name: Tired Police

attributes.content: You think I'm not?
attributes.name: Frustrated Police

attributes.content: I mean, I really am tired.
attributes.name: Tired Police

attributes.content: We and a whole bunch of scum couldn't catch one bloody woman. Kuso. Kuso.
attributes.name: Tired Police

attributes.content: She wouldn't touch a hair on our heads. The real scum are the ones she knocked out with her sheath, all of them have a rap sheet ten thousand ri long.
attributes.name: Tired Police

attributes.content: And we're working with these scum against her, while she knocks them out one-by-one...
attributes.name: Tired Police

attributes.content: Kuso... Kuso!
attributes.name: Tired Police

attributes.content: Koretou keeps saying, 'it'll get better', but I've been on the job for almost ten years, and I don't see things improving one bit—
attributes.name: Tired Police

attributes.content: Out of the way, cop!
attributes.name: Savage Ninja

attributes.content: Shougo!
attributes.name: Frustrated Police

attributes.content: How dare you attack a police!
attributes.name: Frustrated Police

attributes.content: I told you to get out of the way—
attributes.name: Savage Ninja

attributes.content: Why you—
attributes.name: Frustrated Police

attributes.content: They stare into each other's eyes.
Excuse me, officer. May I pass?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Or, I could commit assault on an officer of the law. Or murder. I'm not picky at the moment.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The officer sighs and stands aside, putting his empty hands where Hoshiguma can see them.
Thanks. For Shougo.
attributes.name: Frustrated Police

attributes.content: Ding, dong, ding, Lingones Department Store♪
attributes.name: Repeating Broadcast

attributes.content: Everything you want, you'll find it here, Lingones Department Store♪
attributes.name: Repeating Broadcast

attributes.content: Come in, have a pint! We have just the right lager for an Oni like you—
attributes.name: Eager Staff

attributes.content: Or, if you prefer the more traditional stuff, we have a fine collection of imo shochu for you to pick from...
attributes.name: Eager Staff

attributes.content: Take this, ojou-san.
attributes.name: Fashionable Man

attributes.content: Out of the way.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: What's the hurry? Are you looking for the most precious thing on Terra, the stepping stone to 'happiness'—
attributes.name: Fashionable Man

attributes.content: Wait... you're the Ao-Oni of Kinsekikai?
attributes.name: Fashionable Man

attributes.content: May I ask where Momoka-san is?
attributes.name: Fashionable Man

attributes.content: Are you a fan? Or are you after Mifune's bounty?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Neither. I just want to ask a favor.
attributes.name: Fashionable Man

attributes.content: Can I ask you to 'disappear' me like Momoka-san? Maybe that'll make me go viral like her!
attributes.name: Fashionable Man

attributes.content: It's the Ao-Oni!
attributes.name: Excited Onlooker

attributes.content: Can I get a pic?
attributes.name: Excited Onlooker

attributes.content: Out of the way.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Wait, Ao-Oni-san—
attributes.name: Excited Onlooker

attributes.content: Uh... Ao-Oni-san, we're just a drinking establishment...
attributes.name: Eager Staff

attributes.content: One Moeshima Black, to go.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The Moeshima Black production line shut down a few years ago. May I interest you in the newest offering from the same maker? It's their premium line, which I'm sure you'll be happy with—
attributes.name: Eager Staff

attributes.content: Fine. Whatever.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: While the clerk gets the liquor, Hoshiguma stands with her back against the storefront, gazing coldly at the crowd that has begun to gather.
A city is a big place, whether it's called Lungmen or Mitsukue.
The death of one man does not move the heart of the whole city, much less the death of a yakuza figurehead.
One man has died. Many still live.
But the people who still live, this city that they live in, has nothing to do with her anymore.
No one is following.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: This is a good place.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma opens the bottle, and the smell of alcohol gushes out.
Just smelling it is enough to make her light-headed.
This one's for you, Uncle Tessai.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Ugh... how could this stuff taste so thin, when it's so expensive and the alcohol content so high?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: This is the second time I've drank to someone. The first was to my father at my old home.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The kaidan chasers must be thrilled about the Ao-Oni drinking with a dead man.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Kaidan... hah.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The story of me and Higashi ended when I chose to step up for what was right, when I really didn't know what it was.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It was stupid, even though I survived. Ch'en, too, faced the same choice, and she survived as well, but I still think it's stupid.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You should have met Ch'en Hui-chieh, Uncle Tessai.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: She's a true kyou, although they pronounce it a different way in Yan. But it refers to the same thing: Someone who's willing to stand in the way of an army a thousand strong, armed with nothing more than a sword.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: This one's to her.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: But I'm not like her.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: She's brave. Unlike me—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hah, awkward, isn't it?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: But I'm scared... I can't deny it.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I'm not worried about my own life. But what about other people? Those I'm trying to protect? What about...?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: ...What about my home?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Honestly, I should just set out for Lungmen right now, and never look back.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's a big deal, an L.G.D. officer suspected of murder in Higashi. That'd make a headache for everybody, from Missy to Mr. Lin to Madam Fumizuki to Mr. Wei.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: They won't abandon me. I know what kind of people they are, and they know me well.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: But I caused this.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Will my new home suffer for the trouble that I caused?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: How could I keep calling it home, in that case?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Or I could draw my sword and become a real Oni. A killer.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Kill Kinbee, kill any of his men who dare draw on me, kill any police who stand in my way...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Turn into a nightmare that roams the streets of Mitsukue, become a true monster, become the kaidan after all.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Take vengeance. Go with the tide, embrace the times, become the maddest of the revelers, and become exactly what he...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No, exactly what everyone in Mitsukue wants me to be.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: There's no way out. Every path leads to a dead end.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Is the bottle empty already?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You certainly can hold your drink, Hoshiguma-san.
Who's there?!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Where are your men?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I came alone.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Where's Uncle Tessai's body?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: In police possession. Cause of death was a sword wound, but it was not your sword that did the deed.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Then why are your men after me?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Orders from above.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Are you here to arrest me too?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No, I'm here to drink with you.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Without waiting for an answer, the policeman sits down on the ground and takes out a small glass from his pocket.
Damn, this stuff is strong.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: You want to try to convince me to come quietly, so you can carry out those orders from above?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Then, get you out of Mitsukue and back to Lungmen.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Against the orders of your superiors?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Why do you think I had you taken into custody the moment you entered Mitsukue?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: I would have done the same, if a gang leader who had committed a major crime in Lungmen twenty years ago came back.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Is that all?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: What else could it be?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The policeman looks straight into Hoshiguma's eyes.
When he realizes that Hoshiguma is not joking or hiding anything, he suddenly punches her in the face.
I can't believe you forgot.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: The Diet candidate killed by the Kinsekikai was named Koretou.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: That was for my uncle.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Kono bakayaro. His murder would not have gone ignored all these years, if you didn't stupidly claim responsibility for your stupid yakuza honor.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Sorry...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's a little too late for that. There's nothing I can do about Mifune now.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: He's in cahoots with one of the most powerful Diet member. How else could a yakuza have gained so much influence over the police?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: The best I can do—the best the police can do is to let you go, so he won't get what he wants.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: And Uncle Tessai's death will be nothing more than a footnote in the Ao-Oni kaidan legend and the Haunted House, and nothing will ever get resolved. Same as it was back then, am I right, Detective Koretou of the Spiritual Affairs Station?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You say you don't want him to get what he wants, but all you're doing is helping him.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You think Mifune is behind the kaidan.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: You don't sound surprised.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: A cop is a cop, even if he's from the Spiritual Affairs Station. I can smell where the rot is coming from, even with this chained collar around my neck.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: So you've made peace with the chains?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: All you need to worry about is filling your own stomach with fried meatchop with rice. Not all of us are the same.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Do you know how much it costs to get a house that can barely squeeze a family of four in Mitsukue?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: I'm not sure I want to know.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: If you're willing to pay off my loans and take my wife and kids to Lungmen, sure, I'll turn your old home upside down.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Or, if you're absolutely certain that it'll be a fatal blow to Mifune, I could potentially see myself jumping on this gamble of yours.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Now, it's your turn to answer.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Do you plan on paying off these loans that I'm not even sure I could free myself of before I die, or is there a greater power than the Diet, enough to take Mifune out once and for all?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: I'm doing my best to help you. Recognize good faith when you see it, Ao-Oni.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: The policeman angrily downs the last bit of liquor left in the cup.
Come with me.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: No.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Give me a reason.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.text: I want my sacrifice to mean something, but everything in Mitsukue is denying it.
What else is left for me in this empty city?
I hope Missy had a better summer in Siesta than I did here—

attributes.content: ...guma!
Who's there?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Who's what? What are you talking about?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: ...Hoshiguma!
Ghost-san!
Momoka?!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Do you hear Momoka's voice, Koretou?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Momoka? The idol? Isn't she supposed to be with you? I was going to ask where you hid—
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: I'm over here!
attributes.name: Momoka's Voice

attributes.content: This way!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma runs in the direction of the voice.
Koretou sighs and follows her.
There's no one here. But the voice is getting closer—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Over here! This way!
attributes.name: Momoka's Voice

attributes.content: Momoka?!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: What—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: ...What are you doing in a TV?
Neither Hoshiguma nor Koretou say it out loud.
A shabby TV set lies outside a tiny shop. It is hard to tell what the shop does, or if it is even open at all.
Inside, Momoka is yelling something at Hoshiguma.
She is not looking at Hoshiguma, but knocking on something in front of her, as though she is trying to break the TV screen and climb out.
You're there, right, Hoshiguma?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I'm here! Can't you see me?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I can't see you, but I can hear you!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Oh, I'm so relieved... I thought it was all over...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Hold the tears. Where are you? What's going on with this TV?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Kichisei and I are being held prisoner at Kinbee's base—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Bzzt.
Momoka?!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The TV goes dark.
A cold wind blows through the gaps between the buildings, and Hoshiguma's sword hums in its sheath.
Koretou.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I was agitated by Uncle Tessai's death and forgot a few things. My bad.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: But what about you? Did you really think I'd hidden Momoka?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Kichisei too. I guess she's not important to you, nothing more than an inveterate pachinko gambler.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma—
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: What's one or two innocent lives to you, as long as you get this troublemaker out of town? After all, they're already knee-deep in this Kinbee mess. Why bother?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: We'll do our best to protect them—
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: The people who died in the Haunted House, Uncle Tessai, that yakuza killed in Kajimachi a few days ago... since when have you been any good at protecting anybody?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It is Hoshiguma's turn to punch the detective in the face.
The detective stumbles back a few steps before steadying himself.
I don't need you to remind me of my failures.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: But you're not a troublemaker to me. You're my trump card, the only thing that can hurt Mifune, the only thing standing between him and total control of Mitsukue.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: And the way you play it is to get me out of the city?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's the best a cop can do.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: A cop, eh?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You're a cop too. You know the limitations.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Go back to Lungmen, Hoshiguma. Your 'particular individual' and the L.G.D. will take care of things for you.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Hoshiguma instinctively reaches into her pocket, where her L.G.D. badge is.
But the first thing she feels is something soft, the ribbon that Tessai gave her after removing it from Hannya. A gift from her friends, bearing their best wishes.
For some reason, she feels like she can smell the sea breeze of Siesta.
The haystacks of the Victorian plains.
The aroma of Lungmen's downtown restaurants.
...And the scent of Kajimachi's old wooden houses.
You're right.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Good, you've seen the light. Now hurry up and—
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: I mean, you're right that the L.G.D. would take care of things for me.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Maybe I've been too cautious... too concerned about bothering my friends.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: What do you mean?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Hoshiguma does not answer. She takes the sword and sheath from her belt, and begins wrapping the ribbon around the handle.
You're going to use the sword? For what?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: I have a promise to fulfill.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You're going to rescue them?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Don't be sil—
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Missy would probably be angry enough to burst a few blood vessels if I just went back to Lungmen with my tail between my legs, assuming I had a tail. And I'd never be able to look Lin Yühsia in the eye again.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: As for Ch'en... I still have to fight Chi Xiao with the reforged Hannya. I can't very well go back empty-handed.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Aren't you afraid that you'll regret it for the rest of your life, like twenty years ago?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Uncle Tessai said that Hannya was imbued with the secret art of the temples. But I didn't have the discipline to suppress the madness in my Oni blood.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Discipline, madness... don't you think all that's a little vague?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I don't know what would've happened twenty years ago if the secret art was there, and I don't care. I don't need it now.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: As long as this ribbon touches my hand, Hoshiguma will never fall to bloodlust.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: As for regrets, the only thing I regret is that I tried to shoulder everything myself, but I was obsessed my sacrifice meaning something.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Why do you think you have to do this? Is it because you're a cop, or because you're yakuza?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Cop? Yakuza?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: None of that matters.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I promised Momoka, that's all.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Oh, and since I'm going to rescue them, it's more likely than not I'll run into Mifune at some point... and I'll go find him if I don't. There's something I have to ask him.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma sees a light begin to appear from within the policeman's sunken, world-weary eyes.
You'll fight him?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: I'm not looking for a fight, but I'm not sure there's a way out of it.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Put a gash or two in him for me.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: You don't even have to ask.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Is that enough, though?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Like I said, I'm a cop.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: I'm going back to the station.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: I'll do my best to fend off pressure from upstairs, as long as there are no corpses.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Words cannot express my gratitude.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I hope I live up to it.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou
